purpose: Initializes program by accepting current date and displaying startup messages.
Reads the next authorization summary from IMS, updates counters, and processes associated details if account ID is numeric.
Displays a message indicating the file closing process.
Inserts the parent segment of the authorization summary into GSAM file using IMS call and abends on failure.
Finds the next authorization detail segment using IMS GNP call, updates read counters, stores child segment data, and sets end-of-child flag if no more segments.
Abends the program with return code 16 when an unexpected IMS status code is encountered during retrieval of the next authorization summary.
Inserts the retrieved authorization detail segment into the GSAM output file after moving it to the child segment record.
Abends the program with return code 16 when the IMS GNP call fails with an unexpected status code during traversal of child segments.
Abends the program with return code 16 if the GSAM insertion of the parent authorization summary segment fails.
Abends the program with return code 16 if the GSAM insertion of the child authorization detail segment fails.
